svg.title: Personal Opportunity Graph — full system architecture
svg.desc: Seven-layer system architecture from raw data sources through normalizer, JSONL output, dedup, storage, intelligence scoring, and surface layers. Built phases shown in solid teal/coral, planned phases in dashed gray.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me the Feedspot normalizer source code and explain how it handles the two schema variants across 16 files.')
sendPrompt('Show me the Scoble normalizer and explain how it extracts WORKS_AT edges from @mention overflow columns.')
sendPrompt('Show me the Clutch normalizer and explain how service percentages become weighted OFFERS_SERVICE edges.')
sendPrompt('Show me the Facebook normalizer and explain how it handles both raw CSS-scraped files and the two structured Excel files.')
sendPrompt('Show me the Skool normalizer and explain how it infers IN_COMMUNITY edges from welcome message text.')
sendPrompt('Show full feedspot.py source code')
sendPrompt('Show full scoble.py source code')
sendPrompt('Show full clutch.py source code')
sendPrompt('Show full facebook.py source code')
sendPrompt('Show full skool.py source code')
sendPrompt('Show full utils.py — ID generation, dedup keys, follower parsing, topic clustering, warmth scoring')
sendPrompt('Show full models.py — PersonNode, CompanyNode, PublisherNode, CommunityNode, Edge dataclasses')
sendPrompt('Show full main.py — orchestrator, ego node definition, 4 venture embedding variants, run stats')
sendPrompt('Show sample records from nodes_publisher.jsonl and describe the PublisherNode schema fields')
sendPrompt('Show sample records from nodes_person.jsonl, explain warmth tiers and 316 Skool DM contacts at score 1.0')
sendPrompt('Show sample records from nodes_company.jsonl — Clutch vs Scoble company nodes and their different property sets')
sendPrompt('Show sample records from nodes_community.jsonl — Facebook vs Skool community nodes, topic clusters, member counts')
sendPrompt('Show the ego node JSON and all 4 venture-specific embedding variants for Applied Insights, AEGIS-T2A, RGN, and job search')
sendPrompt('Show edge type distribution: 591K OFFERS_SERVICE, 234K HAS_AUTHOR, 57K WORKS_AT, 746 MEMBER_OF, 316 WARM_CONTACT')

sendPrompt('Write Phase 2: the dedup pipeline using rapidfuzz for fuzzy matching across all 5 node types. Include sha256 primary dedup and Jaro-Winkler fuzzy fallback with thresholds from the schema doc.')

sendPrompt('Write Phase 3: batch Ollama nomic-embed-text embedding over 675K nodes. Include chunking, progress tracking, error recovery, and output format that attaches 768-dim vectors to each JSONL node.')
sendPrompt('Write Phase 4: the Neo4j bulk loader using py2neo — nodes first, then edges. Include Cypher for GDS PageRank, Louvain community detection, and betweenness centrality queries.')

sendPrompt('Write Phase 4: the Qdrant Docker setup and Python upsert pipeline for 3 collections (profiles, companies, communities) with HNSW index config and payload filtering for venture-specific queries.')
sendPrompt('Explain node2vec structural embeddings and write the code to run them via Neo4j GDS on the opportunity graph to generate 128-dim position vectors for every node.')
sendPrompt('Write the homophily attribute overlap scorer: compare ego skills/interests against extracted node attributes from bio parsing, return 0–1 score per candidate node.')
sendPrompt('Write the nightly opportunity scoring job: vector_sim × homophily × pagerank × warmth × recency, stored as node property in Neo4j. Run it per venture context — 4 ego variants.')
sendPrompt('Implement the weak-tie bridge node detector: nodes with high betweenness centrality but low direct cosine similarity to ego — Granovetter weak ties to undiscovered clusters.')

sendPrompt('Set up Microsoft GraphRAG open-source over Neo4j + Qdrant. Show how to configure community hierarchy indexing and write multi-hop queries like: find everyone in my 2-hop network adjacent to AI governance.')
sendPrompt('Build the daily opportunity digest cron job: top-5 highest-scoring new nodes each morning, grouped by venture (Applied Insights, AEGIS-T2A, RGN, jobs), output as email + Flask UI.')
sendPrompt('Build the RAG chat interface over Neo4j + Qdrant using R2R open-source. Support queries like: who should I reach out to about AEGIS-T2A? Find AI governance founders in my 2-hop network.')
